name: speakslice
description: FREE, CPU-first speaker diarization and transcription service

scripts.dev: bun run build:watch & bun run --hot src/server.ts
scripts.dev:debug: bun run build:watch & bun run --hot src/server.ts --debug
scripts.start: bun run build && bun run src/server.ts
scripts.start:debug: bun run build && bun run src/server.ts --debug
